name: Pharma-Bio Serv, Inc.
business: Pharma-Bio Serv, Inc. is a regulatory affairs, quality, compliance and technology transfer consulting firm. It serves the pharmaceutical, chemical, biotechnology, medical devices, cosmetic, and food industries. Its primary markets are Puerto Rico, the United States, Europe, and to a lesser extent Brazil.

exposures.sentence: We market our services to pharmaceutical, chemical, biotechnology, medical devices, cosmetic and food industries, and allied products companies principally in Puerto Rico, the United States, Europe and Brazil.
